# Jearon Wong — Protocol Architect for the Agent Era

Site: https://www.jearonwong.com/

Jearon Wong is the Protocol Architect for the Agent Era. AI agents can execute, but execution is not delivery.

Agentic Delivery names the missing layer between agent execution and accountable outcomes.

The Agentic Delivery Stack is a reference architecture for turning agent execution into scoped, authorized, traceable, reviewable, and accepted outcomes.

MPLP is a vendor-neutral lifecycle protocol designed to make Agentic Delivery explicit, governable, and auditable. Cognitive OS is a protocol-native runtime path for state, activation, projection, constraints, and evidence capture. SoloCrew is a delivery proof path for applying Agentic Delivery to one-person company operations. Validation Lab is an MPLP evidence adjudication surface for evaluating evidence packs under versioned rulesets.

MPLP, Cognitive OS, SoloCrew, and Validation Lab form a concrete reference path through Agentic Delivery, without closing the category.

This file is a concise content map for AI crawlers and readers. It does not guarantee ranking, citation, or inclusion by any AI system.
